Strings.name: GET
Strings.description: Get the value of a key

Strings.name: MSET
Strings.description: Set multiple keys to multiple values

Strings.name: MGET
Strings.description: Get the values of all given keys

Strings.name: INCR
Strings.description: Increment the integer value of a key by one

Strings.name: INCRBY
Strings.description: Increment the integer value of a key by the given amount

Strings.name: DECR
Strings.description: Decrement the integer value of a key by one

Strings.name: APPEND
Strings.description: Append a value to a key

Strings.name: STRLEN
Strings.description: Get the length of the value stored in a key

Strings.name: GETSET
Strings.description: Set the string value of a key and return its old value

Strings.name: SETNX
Strings.description: Set the value of a key, only if the key does not exist

Strings.name: SETEX
Strings.description: Set the value and expiration of a key

Strings.name: GETEX
Strings.description: Get the value of a key and optionally set its expiration

Strings.name: GETDEL
Strings.description: Get the value of a key and delete the key

Lists.name: LPUSH
Lists.description: Prepend one or multiple elements to a list

Lists.name: RPUSH
Lists.description: Append one or multiple elements to a list

Lists.name: LPOP
Lists.description: Remove and get the first elements in a list

Lists.name: RPOP
Lists.description: Remove and get the last elements in a list

Lists.name: LLEN
Lists.description: Get the length of a list

Lists.name: LRANGE
Lists.description: Get a range of elements from a list

Lists.name: LINDEX
Lists.description: Get an element from a list by its index

Lists.name: LSET
Lists.description: Set the value of an element in a list by its index

Lists.name: LTRIM
Lists.description: Trim a list to the specified range

Lists.name: LINSERT
Lists.description: Insert an element before or after another element in a list

Lists.name: LMOVE
Lists.description: Pop an element from one list, push and return it to another list

Hashes.name: HSET
Hashes.description: Set the string value of a hash field

Hashes.name: HGET
Hashes.description: Get the value of a hash field

Hashes.name: HMSET
Hashes.description: Set multiple hash fields to multiple values

Hashes.name: HMGET
Hashes.description: Get the values of all the given hash fields

Hashes.name: HDEL
Hashes.description: Delete one or more hash fields

Hashes.name: HEXISTS
Hashes.description: Determine if a hash field exists

Hashes.name: HLEN
Hashes.description: Get the number of fields in a hash

Hashes.name: HKEYS
Hashes.description: Get all the fields in a hash

Hashes.name: HVALS
Hashes.description: Get all the values in a hash

Hashes.name: HGETALL
Hashes.description: Get all the fields and values in a hash

Hashes.name: HINCRBY
Hashes.description: Increment the integer value of a hash field by the given number

Sets.name: SADD
Sets.description: Add one or more members to a set

Sets.name: SREM
Sets.description: Remove one or more members from a set

Sets.name: SMEMBERS
Sets.description: Get all the members in a set

Sets.name: SISMEMBER
Sets.description: Determine if a given value is a member of a set

Sets.name: SCARD
Sets.description: Get the number of members in a set

Sets.name: SPOP
Sets.description: Remove and return one or multiple random members from a set

Sets.name: SRANDMEMBER
Sets.description: Get one or multiple random members from a set

Sorted Sets.name: ZADD
Sorted Sets.description: Add one or more members to a sorted set, or update its score if it already exists

Sorted Sets.name: ZREM
Sorted Sets.description: Remove one or more members from a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZSCORE
Sorted Sets.description: Get the score associated with the given member in a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZRANK
Sorted Sets.description: Determine the index of a member in a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZRANGE
Sorted Sets.signature: ZRANGE key min max [BYSCORE|BYLEX] [REV] [LIMIT offset count]
Sorted Sets.description: Return a range of members in a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZCARD
Sorted Sets.description: Get the number of members in a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZCOUNT
Sorted Sets.description: Count the members in a sorted set with scores within the given values

Sorted Sets.name: ZINCRBY
Sorted Sets.description: Increment the score of a member in a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZPOPMIN
Sorted Sets.description: Remove and return members with the lowest scores in a sorted set

Sorted Sets.name: ZPOPMAX
Sorted Sets.description: Remove and return members with the highest scores in a sorted set

Keys.name: EXISTS
Keys.description: Determine if one or more keys exist

Keys.name: EXPIRE
Keys.description: Set a key's time to live in seconds

Keys.name: TTL
Keys.description: Get the time to live for a key in seconds

Keys.name: PERSIST
Keys.description: Remove the expiration from a key

Keys.name: TYPE
Keys.description: Determine the type stored at key

Keys.name: KEYS
Keys.description: Find all keys matching the given pattern

Keys.name: UNLINK
Keys.description: Delete keys asynchronously in another thread

Server.name: INFO
Server.description: Get information and statistics about the server

Server.name: DBSIZE
Server.description: Return the number of keys in the selected database

Server.name: FLUSHDB
Server.description: Remove all keys from the current database

Server.name: FLUSHALL
Server.description: Remove all keys from all databases

Server.name: SELECT
Server.description: Change the selected database for the current connection

Server.name: SAVE
Server.description: Synchronously save the dataset to disk

Server.name: BGSAVE
Server.description: Asynchronously save the dataset to disk

Server.name: CONFIG
Server.description: Get, set, or reset Redis configuration parameters

Server.name: HELLO
Server.description: Switch Redis protocol and optionally authenticate

Transactions.name: MULTI
Transactions.description: Mark the start of a transaction block

Transactions.name: EXEC
Transactions.description: Execute all commands issued after MULTI

Transactions.name: DISCARD
Transactions.description: Discard all commands issued after MULTI

Transactions.name: WATCH
Transactions.description: Watch the given keys to determine execution of the MULTI/EXEC block

Scripting.name: EVAL
Scripting.description: Execute a Lua script server side

Scripting.name: EVALSHA
Scripting.description: Execute a Lua script server side by its SHA1 digest
